title: Create Attack 6
description: The sixth season is here! Create Attack is the multiplayer project you are looking for with the Create Mod. Created by HerDoctor and presented by RTO Community
body:
**

The Official Modpack for the RTO Community

**

Create Attack 6, presented by Herr Doctor, is the sixth season of the popular Create Attack modpack series. This modpack is built around the Create mod, which lets you build complex machines, automate tasks, and create incredible mechanical systems. From windmills to conveyor belts, you can design factories and farms that run all on their own. But **Create Attack 6** is more than just machines! It includes a variety of other mods that add exploration, adventure, and creativity to your Minecraft world. With **Biomes O' Plenty**, you can discover tons of new biomes, each with unique landscapes, trees, plants, and animals. Whether you want to build in a cherry blossom forest, snowy mountains, or a tropical paradise, this modpack has the perfect biome for your next base. For players who love organizing, **Storage Drawers** is included to help you manage your items. Instead of using countless chests, you can store large amounts of items in neat, easy-to-access drawers. With **Sophisticated Backpacks**, you can take your storage on the go, using customizable backpacks with special upgrades like auto-pickup and crafting. To help you navigate this big world, **Xaero's Minimap** adds a mini-map to your game, showing you where you are, what’s around you, and letting you mark important places with waypoints. No more getting lost in caves or forgetting where your base is! **Create Attack 6** also makes multiplayer more fun. With **Simple Voice Chat**, you can talk directly to other players without needing external programs. It works based on how close you are in-game, so you can chat while working together or exploring. Whether you want to focus on building complex machinery, exploring new biomes, or working together with friends, **Create Attack 6** has something for everyone. With a combination of technology, exploration, and multiplayer features, this modpack offers a well-rounded and fun Minecraft experience for all types of players!

**

Minimum system requirements

** - Recommended at least 10 GB RAM - Dedicated graphics card

**

Modpack Content
